name: AirTrip Corp.
summary: AirTrip Corp. engages in the online travel agency business in Japan. It offers business travel management and other services. The company also offers IT offshore development project services, such as lab-type offshore development and BPO services. In addition, it engages in investment business. The company was formerly known as Evolable Asia Corp. and changed its name to AirTrip Corp. in January 2020. AirTrip Corp. was founded in 2007 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
